arts.ttl: Former Galway United and Ireland Under-21 forward celebrates new Burnley deal with promotion
arts.sum: Former Galway United prospect Dara Costelloe has celebrated his contract extension at Burnley by moving up a division with his latest loan move. The 22-year-old spent the first half of the season at League Two side Accrington Stanley, where he scored five goals in 21 first-team appearances.

arts.ttl: 'For sure': Scott Parker makes Burnley goalless draw admission ahead of Oxford United test
arts.sum: Scott Parker has admitted Burnley’s glut of frustrating goalless draws could well prove costly come the end of the season – unless they rectify it as soon as possible.

arts.ttl: Ajax: Banel signs for Burnley and Tahirovic moves to Brondby
arts.sum: Ajax youngster Jaydon Banel swapped Amsterdam for Burnley on Monday evening, with Benjamin Tahirović also leaving for Danish side Brondby.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Oxford United: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets bid to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: Burnley will be keen to get back to winning ways when they host Oxford United tonight after playing out consecutive goalless draws.

arts.ttl: Burnley predicted team to face Oxford United as Scott Parker mulls over changes - gallery
arts.sum: Facing a second game in the space of four days, Scott Parker will be mulling over whether he needs to make changes to freshen up his Burnley side.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Burnley vs. Oxford
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Burnley vs. Oxford

arts.ttl: Two in, one out, but no striker: How Burnley's transfer deadline day played out
arts.sum: Despite three deals being done, it felt like a relatively unspectacular final day of the January transfer window for Burnley.

arts.ttl: Banel departs Ajax for Burnley as Goalkeeper joins Dortmund
arts.sum: Ajax have sold Jaydon Banel to Burnley and Diant Ramaj to Borussia Dortmund. The 20-year-old forward was out of contract in Amsterdam in the summer and Ajax have allowed him to leave for a small fee, believed to be around €1 million. Banel played a handful of games in the Eredivisie last season but has […] The post Banel departs Ajax for Burnley as Goalkeeper joins Dortmund appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Young Ajax winger becomes Burnley's second capture of transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Burnley have made Ajax wide man Jaydon Banel their second signing of transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Kyle Edwards joins League One side after expiration of U’s deal
arts.sum: KYLE Edwards has joined Sky Bet League One side Stevenage.
